raw.subject: Your Visalia page caught my eye, Lifestyle Photography Studio
raw.body:
Hi,

I love the photo of the little one who came a bit early to shine! She has such a sweet sleeping position. It's clear you capture special moments.

But I noticed you don't have your own website yet, which might be missing out on potential bookings and calls from clients who want to learn more about your services.

I sketched up a homepage idea from your Facebook photos and posts. It includes a services overview section, a photo gallery showcasing your beautiful work, and a contact section with your hours and address.

https://sites.damianbasilio.dev/preview/lifestyle-photography-studio-visalia

I'd love to discuss this idea further and see if it's something that would work for you. This is a straightforward project with a flat fee for local businesses. Please reply or let's schedule a quick call to get started.
